chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 752 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 27-04-2023 Mr. Piyas Ali Soomro, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Robina Qadir, Addl.P.G. ============= Omar Sial J: Syed Mohammad Anis has sought post arrest bail in crime number 417 of 2022 registered under sections 6 and 9(c) of the CNS Act, 1997 at the Mochko police station. Earlier, his application seeking bail was dismissed on 16.03.2023 by the learned 6th Sessions Judge, Karachi West. 2. The aforementioned F.I.R. was registered on 12.10.2022 on the complaint of S.I. Nazir Ahmed who reported an offence of earlier that day. Ahmed recorded that a police party led by him was on patrol duty when it found the applicant behaving suspiciously. When searched, he was found to be in possession of 2.325 Kgs of charas. 3. Learned counsel for the applicant has argued that the applicant has been in jail for 8 months and that the registration number of the police mobile has been written differently at 2 places in the police papers. Unfortunately, both grounds are not sufficient for the grant of bail. Prima facie the applicant was apprehended red handed with a substantial quantity of charas in his possession. The chemical laboratory has confirmed that the seized material was indeed charas. No malafide or enmity on the part of the police has been alleged, argued or as a matter of fact borne out from the record. 4. Bail application is dismissed. JUDGE
